rowColorVariety.name: Row Color Variety
rowColorVariety.description: 6 VP for each complete row with no repeated colors

colColorVariety.name: Column Color Variety
colColorVariety.description: 5 VP for each complete column with no repeated colors

rowShadeVariety.name: Row Shade Variety
rowShadeVariety.description: 5 VP for each complete row with no repeated values

colShadeVariety.name: Column Shade Variety
colShadeVariety.description: 4 VP for each complete column with no repeated values

lightShades.name: Light Shades
lightShades.description: 2 VP per pair of 1-value and 2-value dice

mediumShades.name: Medium Shades
mediumShades.description: 2 VP per pair of 3-value and 4-value dice

deepShades.name: Deep Shades
deepShades.description: 2 VP per pair of 5-value and 6-value dice

shadeVariety.name: Shade Variety
shadeVariety.description: 5 VP per set of one die of each value from 1 to 6

colorVariety.name: Color Variety
colorVariety.description: 4 VP per set of one die of each color

colorDiagonals.name: Color Diagonals
colorDiagonals.description: 1 VP per die with a diagonal die of the same color

score.selectPrivateObjective: Select a private objective to calculate score.
